message.content:
Thoroughly explore the mobile app's PostCard system and social API. I need to understand:

1. All files in C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_mobile_app\apps\mobile\src\components\PostCard\ 
2. The ActionBar component - what actions it currently supports
3. The socialApi at C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_mobile_app\apps\mobile\src\lib\api\socialApi.ts - check if there are any existing reaction-related API methods
4. The mobileApi at C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_mobile_app\apps\mobile\src\lib\api\mobileApi.ts - check feed data shape, does it include reactions?
5. How PostCard is used in HomeFeedScreen (C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_mobile_app\apps\mobile\src\screens\Home\HomeFeedScreen.tsx)
6. The PostCard props interface
7. Any existing reaction types or interfaces

Read all relevant files completely.
